title: RoutingDecisionTranscript (v1)
description: Signed routing-decision transcript (subject = signer — receipt-family): the delegator's own record of why a worker won a paid hire. Freezes the admissible candidate set, per-candidate posterior reads and draws, and the decision parameters; integrity verified by verifyRoutingTranscript in @motebit/crypto, faithfulness recomputed by recomputeRoutingDecision in @motebit/semiring under the pinned algorithm_version. Spec: spec/routing-transcript-v1.md.

delegator_motebit_id.description: The delegator — the chooser and the signer (subject = signer).

delegator_public_key.description: The delegator's Ed25519 public key, lowercase hex.

candidates.description: The frozen admissible candidate set, in ranked order.

seed.description: Seed provenance: the tick token's Ed25519 signature — binds the transcript to the delegation turn; per-candidate draw seed is `${seed}|${motebit_id}`.

strength.description: Base exploration strength in [0,1], before any bond boost.

weights.description: The composite weights the ranking consumed.

count_cap.description: Evidence cap applied to posterior counts (frozen ranker-internal literal).

bond_explore_boost.description: Multiplicative bond exploration boost (frozen ranker-internal literal).

default_latency_ms.description: Neutral latency (ms) assumed per candidate (frozen ranker-internal literal).

algorithm_version.description: The ranking-implementation version this transcript is recomputable under.

winner_motebit_id.description: The worker hired; MUST be a member of `candidates`.

pinned.description: Present (true) only when the hire was a pinned deterministic override — no draw ran.

explored.description: Whether the exploration draw overrode the exploit-favorite.

suite.description: Cryptosuite (pinned literal — new suites arrive as new transcript versions).

signature.description: Ed25519 over the JCS-canonical transcript minus this field, base64url.
